Ivy Etched Bracer  
 


Slot: WRIST
AC: 9
DEX: +2
SV POISON: +3
WT: 2.3 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Ivy Etched Bracer

Slot: WRIST
AC: 9
DEX: +2
SV POISON: +3
WT: 2.3 Size: SMALL
Class: RNG
Race: HUM ELF HEF HFL DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):100, 175, 100
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:1 pp 4 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:86

Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:42:49
Page Updated:Thu May 4th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 139pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 30
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Ivy Etched Bracer

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kithicor Forest
Send a correction
Post Comment
Kithicor at night
QuoteReply
# Jul 17 2007 at 7:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591945104519
29 posts
If you are afraid of Kith at night, don't worry you're not alone...my level 68 ranger still gets the willies going in there. Don't fear there is a way around being murderized by the creepies that run around in there. Have a cleric and a necro go in there with you and watch the fireworks as they unload their undead special spells on the boogie woogies running around. Or you can hire a high level druid to play with the mobs while you get done with your quest. Just thought I'd help out the noobies that haven't seen Kith at night like it used to be....Well see ya'all on the game.
▲ Page top
how to survice Kithicor Forest
QuoteReply
# May 31 2003 at 3:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787666011
13 posts
I'm a lvl 32 Ranger on the Rodect Nife server, i have all the items needed for the bracer. But what is the best way to make it through Kithicor Forest to give the items to Gandari? I've been there twice and was destroyed before i even got half way there.
▲ Page top
RE: how to survice Kithicor Forest
QuoteReply
# Dec 14 2003 at 10:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592258927089
11 posts
Not just night time is this place dangerous to some. Nasty darkelves with powerful HT will kill ya in a blink if ya not got faction, best way to navigate through this place is imediatly hug top of zone wall on Rivervale side. Travel this way till you are perpendicular to Gandari and hope you don't run across the path of the nasty Dark elves.

Leranga
▲ Page top
RE: how to survive Kithicor Forest
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2003 at 2:10 AM Rating: Decent
bschenk
Scholar
313 posts
To survive in Kithicor, just go during daytime hours. At night, all sorts of nasty undead creatures roam the zone, but during the day, they are gone. So if you see a bunch of evil critters around waiting to eat you up, use /time to find out how long you have to sit at the zone line and practice your spellcasting... Farewell!
____________________________
-----
Henrian Illinoid -
80th Level Half Elf 4000AAs/Epic 1.5
Ranger of Tunare - The Rathe
http://www.magelo.com/eq_view_profile.html?num=437223
▲ Page top
RE: how to survive Kithicor Forest
QuoteReply
# Jun 02 2003 at 12:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787666011
13 posts
Thanks for the info i can just improve my conjuration using dance of fireflies while waiting for the sun to come up
▲ Page top
Better than Bronze
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2003 at 7:22 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256193967
4 posts
I just got my first one last night it took some help at 27 but it was fun and interesing. Redwind was the hardest one, but with a couple of harmony spell to all the icy orcs I got one helping him at the most. His pet will go down if you use ward summon. Everyone seem to say "this is not good"or "I like this better" O.K. but for us that don't know where the GOOD STUFF is it is good armor. Better then the bronze I got form PC. lol

Kailor Sommerswerd
Ranger of Tunare

If the gods didn't what us to learn, they wouldn't give Experience (your have become better at Quotes 23)

Edited, Thu Jan 23 18:58:51 2003

finaly got mine
QuoteReply
# May 21 2002 at 9:58 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254085207
16 posts
well, I finaly reached level 27 and compleated the quest, love it! almost done getting my second one, and only took me about an hour with the assistance of a porter to get me to the two hunt spots. getting the rest of the set as soon as I can
▲ Page top
Wondering
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 1:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758130200
60 posts
I already have one bracer, but Im wondering if I should swap out my serpentine bracer for a second one. Which one do you think is a better bracer?
▲ Page top
RE: Wondering
QuoteReply
# Sep 04 2001 at 3:26 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592247010486
Scholar
360 posts
This is better. It's not even close. AC should be your primary concern, stats are just candy.

Arynduil Greyleaf
35th Ranger of Tunare
Norrathian Brotherhood, Erollsi Marr
▲ Page top
RE: Wondering
QuoteReply
# Nov 29 2001 at 1:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592250550311
4 posts
Another consideration, and probably a bit faster, would be the Bracer of Scavenging... also ac 9, with dex and sta(?) Drops off the Iksar Bandit Lord in Warsilk Woods. Easy solo camp around 33... all blues and light blues... bring a group for the mid twenty to early thirties. Takes from 1 to 1.5 hours.
▲ Page top
At last
QuoteReply
# Aug 04 2001 at 1:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757935784
34 posts
It took me forever but at last I got one. It is both effiecent, looks cool, and all and all a good item. A must have for any ranger wanting to show off.
▲ Page top
slap in the face
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2001 at 7:39 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Spent all this time collecting the rune and the ring at lvl 24 (with assistance) and go to Kelethin and drop 106pp on the fire emerald to get my first piece of the ivy etched armor. OMW to Freeport, passing through EC and I hear a guy selling one- so I send him a tell to see what he wants for it. 100pp was his reply. I told him to hold on, I was making a bank run (all the while cussing because I felt like I wasted all that time). Now I have two- one I feel good about because I finished the quest to recieve it. The other I feel GREAT about because I shopped the WalMart way!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 11 2001 at 8:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what i dont under stand is why a shaman gets a better bracer than us ranger when they have to kill the same mob and give a few other items. and we have to kill redwind who is a bad motha and get a slightly crapyer bracer. and shaman dont even want it cuz they will put somehting with wis or mana there instead. come on verent its not right.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 11 2001 at 8:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) what i dont under stand is why a shaman gets a better bracer than us ranger when they have to kill the same mob and give a few other items. and we have to kill redwind who is a bad motha and get a slightly crapyer bracer. and shaman dont even want it cuz they will put somehting with wis or mana there instead. come on verent its not right.
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 02 2001 at 1:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) hmmmm ... somebody smoked magik puff tonight eh ?? hehehehe ... high elf rangers.. LOL! what will they think of next??
#REDACTED, Posted: May 01 2001 at 6:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) i was just over at my freinds house and saw 2 high elfs. there was joints all over the place. there all like: im gunna be a ranger man. it was real funny...... i guess you had to be there.
races

these are wood elf, human, and HALF elf.. not high elf

thanks

Scholar
27 posts
I as well as many others i'm assuming sent in a correction about that. Only noticed it when I tried to assemble my ranger in the "your characters" section of this site. I couldn't access these lol. On a side note, haven't seen too many High Elf rangers running around these days.........
